case_title: GOLDEN STATE COACHES INC. VS GO AMERICA TOURS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,505.00 FILED BY GOLDEN STATE COACHES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GO AMERICA TOURS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN STATE COACHES INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GO AMERICA TOURS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO GO AMERICA TOURS INC. RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
